parents.subject: LU-12668 tests: add EC edge case tests

commit.subject: LU-12668 tests: add EC multi-target tests
commit.message:
LU-12668 tests: add EC multi-target tests

Add tests 63a-66d exercising EC recovery with multiple
targets and complex configurations:

- test_63a-d: OST failure cycling and multi-mount
  write/resync -- rapid deactivation/reactivation
  cycles and multi-client coordination
- test_64a-d: 3+ PFL components -- recovery across
  files with multiple PFL extents
- test_65a-d: PFL with different EC geometries per
  component
- test_66a-d: multiple mirror pairs -- recovery with
  several EC mirror groups

Generated with Claude Code + Tools

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-ec
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I157085f5506999bc8b6f89e955903037657a42b9
